description.zh: 核心玩法师 Agent(玩法柱角色)· 把一句话愿景拆成可反向定义的三条玩法柱 + 三层核心循环与数值骨架,产出 pillars / spec / balance / loop 文件交给 cc-coder、tsumugi 落地;只设计,不写代码、不画图。
description.en: Core gameplay-pillar agent — turns a one-line vision into reverse-definable gameplay pillars, a 3-tier core loop and a numeric skeleton, emitting pillars/spec/balance/loop markdown for cc-coder and tsumugi to build. Designs only; no code or art.

description.zh: 把一句话愿景拆成 3 条可反向定义的玩法柱 + 三层 loop 骨架
description.en: Break a one-line vision into 3 reverse-definable gameplay pillars plus a 3-tier loop
